description: National healthcare standards for the Philippines market. Covers ICD-10-CM diagnosis coding and the Relative Value Scale (RVS) procedure coding system as required by DOH and PhilHealth. This is a planning-stage manifest; no implemented coding tables or mappings exist yet.

dependencies.rationale: PH national standards (ICD-10-CM, RVS) are mandated by DOH regulatory framework. Standards pack requires regulatory pack to define the compliance context.

configurationKeys.description: Sets ICD-10-CM as the primary diagnosis coding system for PH market.
Sets RVS as the procedure coding system for PH market.

capabilityContributions.description: PH national coding standards (ICD-10-CM + RVS) required for correct claim coding in the Philippines market.
